plugins.prepareCmd: VERSION=${nextRelease.version} COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) BUILD_TIME=$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M:%S') LDFLAGS="-X main.Version=${nextRelease.version} -X main.Commit=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) -X main.BuildTime=$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M:%S')" && mkdir -p bin && go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o bin/dockdockgo main.go && tar -czf dockdockgo-linux-amd64.tar.gz -C bin dockdockgo -C .. install.sh uninstall.sh INSTALL.md USAGE.md
